item.title: Just Funny X Things, Vol XXIII
item.dc:creator: TwitterLitter

item.title: A good first step
item.description: A better idea would be for the government just to send you a bill, especially for people with simple returns. Many countries already do this. https://www.newser.com/story/351039/irs-makes-free-tax-return-program-permanent.html Oh my, front page. That was a surprise. Thank you for the updoots. The more Democrats we can get in Congress and other positions up and down the ballot, the better chance we have of improving the IRS, funding the IRS, and making sure the wealthy pay their fair share. Who knows, maybe even simplify the tax code? Vote. Vote Blue. And keep being awesome to one another.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni

item.dc:creator: LeeeB

item.title: I'm finally made it out..... Just barely.
item.description:
That's it. I'm out. I'm finally out of the abusive marriage that almost killed me. I'm done with the drinking and the anger and walking on eggshells around her and not eating because "she bought those groceries for her." I have -$6.36 in my bank account but I have an empty basement with a couch for an apartment and, at 42, a new start. Enjoy some memes guys, I just might make it.
Here's the sad part.....Loki can't come with me. Not until I have a place of my own. She's the one who wanted a puppy, but she only likes having a dog when he's in another room
He'll be with me soon enough.
Me and the little guy call him the "big moose" so he made this for him. Sleep well, guys. I know I will tonight. Front page edit... Thank you, everyone. This isn't hyperbole, but I'm not sure I would've made it here without seeing how people care about each other. I saw that here. To all the guys who were laughed at or told to "man up" or whatever other bullshit people say: fuck them! I'm a 6' tall, 210 lb. heavily tattooed contractor from one of the worst neighborhoods in the country. I've fought on the jobsite, stared down a gun in my face on 2 occasions, and generally am not afraid of anything that doesn't have to do with my son. This shit can happen to anyone. I don't have any advice. Get out if you can. Keep your head up if you can't. I love you all. If you're in a position where you're able to, please donate to the Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh Free Care Fund. https://www.givetochildrens.org/our-purpose/featured-initiatives/free-care/
item.dc:creator: RoxJedi

Fun fact, Strava revealed the locations of several secret US army bases through their GPS tracking.

The yay pill! :D

it is them
nokia

item.title: Friday MEME DUMP (I have message for you)
item.description: Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: This ain’t rap, hell it isn’t even music
item.description: Edit: I’m not saying all rap now days is bad. Theres some damn good rap out there with Kendrick, Logic, Eminem (of course, new album hype!) Joyner Lucas, Knox Hill, Harry Mack… but the mumble rap crap is just bit my flavor, and whatever that first and last one were… I don’t even know what to call that.

item.title: This is Crowley.
item.description:
This is Crowley my 1 year old black Manx kitty posing at dusk. He has taken to farm life for sure! It’s been little over a month since I moved to a farm. He has loved every second of it!
He is the friendliest boy.
Beautiful sunset backdrop for the beautiful void.
I love the little nub of a tail he has!
Strolling down the driveway.
Crowley and Tessa, my great Bernese mountain dog who is a LDG or livestock guardian dog always on alert.
The look! The void is starting back.
item.dc:creator: StandingAgain

item.title: Let's add just a little bit more good news to top off all the Trump posts.
item.dc:creator: SteveMND

item.title: My “The Crow” Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— sharing these because I finally got to see the movie on the big screen last night.
It’s been 30 years since The Crow was released (1994)— I was 11 when my mom showed it to me in 2011 and have been obsessed since.
I’ve been doing this cosplay since about 2014, earlier iterations were pretty weak but well-intentioned.
I’m actually really happy with this version. I might redo it for an actual convention soon, with the added electrical/duct tape and my real hair instead of a wig since it’s about that length now.
It’s been really important to me to try and keep this one legit. Brandon and his performance in that movie have meant a lot to me for a very, very long time.
My one and only tattoo is a quote from this movie.
I’m running out of things to say so I’m glad this is the last pic! I hope y’all think I did Brandon justice with these. He’s the one and only “Eric Draven.”
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum
